## Instructions

Launch @Godfather on Telegram
Run /newbot to create a bot and follow the instructions.

### Verify that Node.js & npm are installed: 
`node -v & npm -v`
### Go to the folder where the script is located.

`cd "C:\Users\Shin\Downloads\privatechat-tg.js"`
### Download the various Telegram APIs:
`npm install node-telegram-bot-api`
`npm install -g npm@11.10.0`
### Enter your token generated by @GodFather
`const token = 'Token generated by GodFather here';`
`node privatechat-tg.js`
### In the command prompt after you send the first message via your bot, a ChatId will be generated.
Then modify the line "let ChatId = null;" by replacing null with the given number.
